gold: Số điện thoại. Số đầy đủ.

sigWerErrors.reason: Changing 'Số' (number) to 'Sớ' (document/scroll) alters the meaning of the sentence significantly, making it incoherent in context.

Changing 'đủ' (enough/full) to 'đồ' (thing/object) changes the intended meaning of the phrase 'số đầy đủ' (full number) to 'số đầy đồ' (number full of things), which is incoherent and derails the meaning.
